method-hypothesis summary.summary: The supplied data is strongly consistent with a temporally selected, event-anchored, piecewise ballistic lift: hard shot/bounce geometry, global candidate rejection, robust deviation from noisy per-frame ball pixels, conservative omission, and rare explicit interpolation. The exact optimizer, filter, radius usage, drag, and Magnus usage are not facts exposed by the export.
method-hypothesis summary.coordinate_frame: PB uses feet in a 20x44 corner-origin court frame. x_ours_m=(x_pb_ft-10)*0.3048; y_ours_m=(22-y_pb_ft)*0.3048; z_ours_m=z_pb_ft*0.3048.
method-hypothesis summary.camera: One static segment spans frames 0..299 at 30 fps. FOV=1.212824996 rad. Twelve normalized court points carry confidence 0.924129..0.980230 and spread 0.001061..0.007502; spread semantics are undocumented.
method-hypothesis summary.selected_stream: 183/252 frames: 173 ball, 6 shot, 3 bounce, 1 net. Two emitted runs are 73..125 and 132..261. Only frame 116 is interpolated=true (1/183=0.546%); 69 frames are omitted.
method-hypothesis summary.anchors: All six shot and three bounce positions reproject to their selected action pixel within 1.5e-12 px. All three bounce z values equal 0.037744399 m to numerical precision. Median boundary delta-velocity is 44.61x the interior median.
method-hypothesis summary.selection: Selected type equals per-frame action argmax on only 80.87%. Omitted-frame max action confidence has p50/p95/max 0.542/0.938/0.968, and only three of seven bounce-confidence peaks >=0.5 are selected bounces.
method-hypothesis summary.radius_depth: On 168 paired frames, radius_v vs inverse camera depth has Pearson r=0.850, Spearman r=0.774, and linear R2=0.722. This is cue evidence, not proof of causal use.

no_gt_pillars.physics: 9/9 evaluable PB intervals pass the declared diagnostic; segment re-integration RMSE p50/max=0.0231/0.1350 m. This is self-consistency, not accuracy.
no_gt_pillars.bounce: Selected bounce z-minus-inferred-radius max error is below 3e-16 m; raw confidence peaks are not all plane-consistent and are not pseudo-GT by themselves.
no_gt_pillars.reprojection: All selected 3D p50/p95=23.37/206.37 px; ordinary ball p50/p95=25.35/213.18 px, while shot/bounce anchors are numerically exact. Undocumented distortion/internal candidates may contribute to the ordinary-ball tail.

gap-decomposition table.measurements: Our current artifact: 0 contact anchors, 10 bounce anchors, 11 segments, 9/11 fallback; only 2/3 PB selected bounces matched within 2 frames. PB exports 6 shot, 3 bounce, 1 net boundaries with 44.61x boundary/interior median delta-v.
gap-decomposition table.path: TT3D joint anchor search, audio/Blur event evidence, then whole-rally DP if local search remains unstable.

gap-decomposition table.measurements: Camera center delta 0.02694 m; horizontal-FOV delta 0.274 deg; PB-vs-our camera court projection p50/p95 8.93/13.00 px. Fit-only 3D still differs from PB by 4.64 m p50.
gap-decomposition table.path: Keep as a control; do not spend the next reproduction experiment on another camera solve.

gap-decomposition table.measurements: Our 2D coverage is 80.6% vs PB 58.7%, but overlap p95 is 163.76 px with 8 frames >50 px. Our fit reprojection p50 is 2.52 px yet fit-only 3D disagreement is 4.64 m p50. PB radius-depth R2 is 0.722; our artifact size_observation_count is 0.
gap-decomposition table.path: Dedicated inlier pass, both-ends constraints, then independent radius-depth residual.

gap-decomposition table.measurements: PB emits 183/252=72.6% with 0.55% explicit interpolation. Raw ours emits 252/252 with 229/252=90.9% fallback; gated ours emits 58/252=23.0% and has 196 hidden-no-prediction bands. PB-parity coverage gap is 125 frames/49.6 points.
gap-decomposition table.path: Seeded UKF/physics recovery between fail-open raw output and blanket suppression, always labeled predicted.

reproduction map ranking.path: UKF seeded from adjacent accepted fits behind fail-closed gates
reproduction map ranking.gap_closed: 125-frame gated coverage deficit without exposing 229 weak fallback frames
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: Up to +49.6 coverage points toward PB's 72.6% comparator coverage; accuracy effect unknown without GT.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill if recovered intervals reduce the current emitted 5/5 physics-plausible rate, create >35 m/s steps, worsen bounce/net plausibility, or are labeled measured.

reproduction map ranking.path: TT3D joint anchor-state search (core landed; fresh frozen-harness run required)
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: At least four recovered segments, satisfying standing fallback <5/11 kill target.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill/deprioritize if a fresh same-input candidate remains >=5/11 fallback; candidate density or event evidence is then the bottleneck.

reproduction map ranking.gap_closed: Planar/depth ambiguity after camera and 2D reprojection controls
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: Consume supported size observations instead of 0; PB cue explains 72.2% of radius variance under inverse-depth regression. Meter accuracy effect is not estimable here.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill if held-out reprojection, bounce pseudo-GT, and segment stability do not improve under frozen 2D/camera inputs.

reproduction map ranking.path: visual-gated audio plus BlurBall/WASB blur anchor boosters
reproduction map ranking.gap_closed: 0 our contact anchors versus six PB typed shot boundaries; missed bounce event
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: Add correctly timed candidate anchors before solver changes; exact count must come from reviewed event evidence, not PB.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill if frozen reviewed event timing/precision does not improve even if the competitor sequence looks closer.

reproduction map ranking.path: both-ends pinning plus dedicated RANSAC/inlier pass
reproduction map ranking.gap_closed: 8-frame >50 px 2D tail, fallback reprojection p50 455 px, accepted-fit depth instability
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: Lower held-out/LOO reprojection and endpoint sensitivity; no honest meter estimate without independent GT.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill if accepted segments' held-out residual, endpoint stability, and bounce/net pseudo-GT do not improve.

reproduction map ranking.gap_closed: Global over-segmentation: 10 bounce anchors, no contacts, 11 segments
reproduction map ranking.expected_effect_size: Fewer spurious boundaries and more stable event intervals across detector perturbations.
reproduction map ranking.kill_criteria: Kill if fallback and boundary instability do not improve on the frozen clip set; never tune to PB's event count as if it were GT.

clip-match result.evidence: 2D r=0.9492 on 137 pairs at offset 0; paired pixel p50=5.69; 12-point court residual p50=5.67; 300 frames at 30 fps; camera center/FOV agreement.
clip-match result.cryptographic_limit: PB export contains no filename/source hash, so the PB-side source cannot be hash-matched.

HONEST ISSUES: PB is a competitor comparator, not ground truth; Bland-Altman and deltas measure disagreement, not accuracy.
The PB Euler convention and feet transform are inferred, though court/event reprojection and matched camera geometry strongly support them.
PB court_points have no exported semantic identities; PB-only court reprojection cannot be assigned without the matched local calibration.
interpolated=false is not proven measured: 39 selected rows have selected-action confidence below 0.5.
The radius-depth relationship is correlational and does not prove PB used radius in its objective.
The exact optimizer, temporal selector, filter, drag term, and Magnus term are hypothesis-not-fact.
Physics re-integration can pass a wrong but internally generated trajectory; our absurd raw fallbacks demonstrate this directly.
The lane physics/teleport/net thresholds are diagnostics, not product promotion gates.
PB bounce selections and event pixels are not independent reviewed GT; raw confidence peaks contain false/duplicate candidates.
Ordinary PB ball reprojection tail may include unexported distortion or candidates; exact event reprojection makes the anchor contrast real but does not expose hidden fields.
The source match is evidence-strong but not cryptographic on PB's side because the export omits source identity.
Only the current pulled raw arc and confidence-gated world were scored; TT3D, radius, audio/Blur, DP, inlier, and UKF effects remain predictions until fresh same-harness runs.
Protected Outdoor/Indoor clips were not read. VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
